# Figures

This directory contains generated figures from experiments.

## Training Curves
- `gru_training_curves.png` — GRU loss and LR schedule
- `lstm_training_curves.png` — LSTM loss and LR schedule

## Predictions
- `gru_predictions.png` — GRU predictions vs actual (time series + scatter)

## Model Comparison
- `model_comparison_r2.png` — R² bar chart across all models
- `model_comparison_latency.png` — Latency comparison

## Ablation
- `ablation_r2.png` — R² across ablation variants

*Figures are generated by running the experiment scripts.*
